use_cases: Personal portfolio link-in-bio sections with animated hover effects
Social media contact pages with clip-path reveal animations
External resource linking for creator or freelancer profiles
Community or network page navigation grids
ai_summary: A social media links component featuring external platform links with icon/image support, organized in a responsive bordered grid. Uses CSS clip-path animations for interactive hover effects, revealing diagonal wipe transitions. Suitable for portfolios, contact pages, or link-in-bio-style interfaces where users need quick access to multiple external platforms.
